scenes.image_prompt: A pair of worn-out basketball sneakers on a bedroom floor, scuffed and dirty, late afternoon light from a window, nostalgic mood, cinematic shallow depth of field, 4k

scenes.text: The court where I played until the streetlights came on.
scenes.image_prompt: An outdoor basketball court at dusk, chain net hoop, streetlights just turning on, orange sky, empty court with one ball sitting on the concrete, cinematic wide shot, nostalgic, 4k

scenes.text: They're falling apart now. The sole is peeling and the laces have been replaced twice.
scenes.image_prompt: Extreme close-up of a sneaker sole peeling away from the shoe, frayed new laces on old eyelets, warm light, macro photography showing wear and age, cinematic, 4k

scenes.text: My mom bought them with money she didn't have.
scenes.image_prompt: A mother's hands counting cash bills at a kitchen table under a dim overhead light, modest kitchen background, emotional cinematic close-up, warm tones, 4k

scenes.text: These shoes didn't just carry me. They carried her belief that I was going somewhere.
scenes.image_prompt: Old sneakers sitting on a shelf next to new ones, warm bedroom light, both pairs facing the same direction, symbolic and emotional, cinematic composition, 4k
